A practical guide to using Claude Code, Anthropic’s agentic coding assistant, effectively in real-world development workflows. This repo distills best practices, patterns, and examples for integrating Claude Code into your terminal-based coding environment. Claude Code is a command-line tool that gives you direct access to Claude’s reasoning and coding capabilities. It’s designed for agentic coding - where Claude autonomously explores, edits, and explains code across your project. + How to configure your environment for Claude Code. Claude Code is optimized for agentic coding - AI that acts with autonomy and awareness:. This repository includes a collection of custom slash commands designed to streamline development workflows with Claude Code. Provides comprehensive help documentation for all available custom commands, including usage examples and best practices. *"This is a curated list of slash-commands, CLAUDE.md files, CLI tools, and other resources and guides for enhancing your Claude Code workflow, productivity, and vibes."*.

title: 💻 Claude Code Security Best Practices - Backslash
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Security Best Practices. Claude Code is a popular agentic coding assistant designed by Anthropic to run in a developer’s terminal, offering deep codebase analysis, code generation, project planning, and automation through natural language prompts. ## **Why Claude Code Security Matters**. When AI becomes part of your coding environment, the IDE is no longer “just a text editor.” It’s an insider with:. * **The ability to run commands**. That’s not just convenience — it’s risk. A single poisoned prompt or misconfigured setting can turn Claude Code from your coding partner into a threat actor. This blog is your guide to staying safe: how to configure Claude Code, what traps to avoid, and how to combine internal and external defenses. Every time it runs a command or reads a file, it’s acting with your permissions. ## **The Heart of Security: `managed-settings.json`**. Like most AI coders, Claude Code has a variety of configuration settings for security. Claude Code’s security settings live here:.

title: 💻 How I Batch a Full Week of Content in One Day with Claude Code
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

How I Batch a Full Week of Content in One Day with Claude Code
Dee Willis | Building Digital Products with AI
2340 subscribers
8 likes
117 views
7 Apr 2026
► Join the HerMpire Builders Community to download the free Content Batch Day System skill + manual + implementation guide 👉 https://skool.com/digitalmpire-builders
► Tap into your 14-Day Free Skool Trial: https://www.skool.com/signup?ref=070272b1669f463f91939c76d77d798e

If you want to batch a week of content in one day with Claude, this video is your step-by-step. No code required, no tech background needed, and your content will actually sound like you because we're training it on your voice, your offers, and your audience from the jump.

I walk you through how to use the Content Batch Day System skill inside both Claude desktop and Claude Code. You can start from a topic idea, drop in a blog post URL, or upload a video transcript and it will generate Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, carousels, and community posts all in one session.

Whether you're using Claude desktop or running Claude Code off your computer, I show you both paths so you can choose what works for your setup. And everything you need to get started is completely free in the HerMpire Builders community.

What's inside this video:

- How to install the Content Batch Day System skill in Claude desktop
- How to set up the skill inside Claude Code for faster, file-based batching
- How to build your content pack (brand voice, avatar, offers) so your AI output actually sounds like you
- How to use a blog post, YouTube transcript, or topic idea as your content source
- What types of content it produces across every platform

You don't need to set this up every time. You build the content pack once, and from that point on Claude knows who you are and what you create. That's how you go from spending hours on content every week to getting it all done in one sitting.

Get the skill, the manual, and the implementation guide for free in Builders. Link above.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing #Linux - Qiita
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing. Claude Code users often face the challenge of "wanting to execute multiple prompts sequentially" and "automating code generation with overnight batch processing." Many also need "project-specific prompt management" for their development workflows. This article provides a detailed explanation of the batch processing features added in Prompt Scheduler v1.0.2, along with real development scenarios. I want to clearly state that this is an independent personal development project with no connection whatsoever to Anthropic's Claude or Claude Code. Batch processing in Prompt Scheduler refers to **the functionality of pre-defining multiple prompts and automatically executing them in a specified order**. * Continuous prompt execution in active development projects. # Overnight batch (aggressive execution ignoring limits) \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --ignore-approaching-limit \ --hours # Phased execution during business hours \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --stop-at. * **Project management**: Parallel processing of multiple projects with `--prompt-file`. * **Limit processing**: Aggressive execution with `--ignore-approaching-limit`.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

* /batch Command: Parallel Execution of Large-Scale Code Changes. * Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration. # Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. * The `/batch` command executes codebase-wide migrations safely using **parallel agents + Git Worktree** isolation. * Headless mode (`claude -p`) provides **non-interactive integration** for CI/CD pipelines and shell scripts. Intermediate to advanced Claude Code users looking to scale up with large-scale changes and CI/CD integration. The latter is a non-interactive execution mode for embedding AI processing into CI/CD pipelines. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. Choose headless mode when embedding AI processing into existing CI/CD pipelines. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶.
